title: Apples
description: Crisp, red, a bit tart. Bagged by the pound.

title: Sourdough Loaf
description: Baked this morning — still warm if you're quick.

title: Bananas
description: Sweet and ready today, not tomorrow.

title: Oranges
description: Thin-skinned and juicy, straight off the crate.

title: Whole Milk
description: One litre, from the dairy two towns over.

title: Aged Cheddar
description: Sharp and nutty. Cut to order.

title: Salted Butter
description: Churned in small batches, wrapped in paper.

title: Vine Tomatoes
description: Still on the vine, ripe and sweet.

title: Carrots
description: Tops still on, good and earthy.

title: Local Honey
description: Wildflower, from the hives out back.

title: Potatoes
description: Good keepers, a little dirt still on them.

title: Butterhead Lettuce
description: Loose leaves, crisp core, picked this morning.

title: Garlic
description: Sold by the bulb, plump cloves.
